snippet.title: Chonkers Off-Road Tires Arrive To The Fortnite Island
snippet.description:
Built for handling the toughest driving conditions, Chonkers Off-Road Tires make getting around off road easier in any vehicle.

The Chonkers Off-Road Tires are the first Mod to arrive to the Fortnite Island. These tires are perfect for when you want to take the scenic route but don't want to sacrifice the smooth ride of your current vehicle. Find these tires on the ground or even in some tire piles around the Island.

Hop in, grab a pair of Chonkers Off-Road Tires and take it off road!

#FortniteChonkers #ChonkersOffRoadTires #Fortnite

snippet.title: Justin Bieber - Live from Paris (Livestream)
snippet.description:
Against the breathtaking backdrop of the City Of Lights, and from the lush ruins of a vacant but majestic Parisian hotel, Justin Bieber brings his new album Justice to life with five stunning performances, four of them live debuts. This fifteen minute special brings fans directly into Justin‚Äôs world and opens the doors to his powerful new album.

snippet.title: Ricardo Montaner, Juan Luis Guerra 4.40 - Dios As√≠ Lo Quiso
snippet.description:
Dios As√≠ Lo Quiso ūüíćūüĎę
Ricardo Montaner y Juan Luis Guerra (Video Oficial)
--
Dios as√≠ lo quiso la hicimos en el estudio, est√°bamos reunidos los hermanos David y Jonathan Julca, Camilo Echeverri, Yasmil Marrufo y yo, y empez√≥ a surgir algo que no tenia ni un porqu√©, ni la ten√≠amos muy clara de lo que est√°bamos buscando. Sab√≠amos que lo que yo quer√≠a era una canci√≥n de amor de pareja siguiendo los fundamentos de este √°lbum dedicado al amor, del sentimiento profundo que una persona puede tener por su pareja. ‚ÄúDios as√≠ lo quiso‚ÄĚ es una canci√≥n de amor, que con el correr del tiempo fue tomando esta cadencia como de cumbia que me llevaba si o si al Caribe. Una vez que le mont√© la voz todos me dec√≠an: esta canci√≥n a d√ļo  con Juan Luis ser√≠a espectacular.

¬ŅPorqu√© Juan Luis? 
Primero porque soy un fan de toda la m√ļsica de Juan Luis. Lo conozco de hace mucho y es un hermano que mi familia y yo queremos mucho. Por otro lado, √©l ha hecho una espectacular carrera y su legado musical va a ser eterno. Siempre, siempre, la gente me ha comentado: ¬Ņpara cu√°ndo una canci√≥n con Juan Luis? Yo lo recib√≠a como un ¬Ņqui√©n sabe?, ¬Ņcu√°ndo podr√° ser? o lo recib√≠a como: ¬°alg√ļn d√≠a tendr√© una canci√≥n apropiada para hacer con √©l! Pero cuando le mont√© la voz a esta canci√≥n me tom√© el atrevimiento de escribirle, le mostr√© el tema y le dije que so√Īaba con poder  hacerla con √©l. Juan Luis no me dej√≥ terminar, literalmente, no me dej√≥ terminar. Me dijo que estaba encantado con la canci√≥n y por supuesto me dijo que s√≠. De ah√≠ en adelante todo transcurri√≥ de maravilla, hasta que Juan Luis mont√≥ voces, me la envi√≥ e hicimos esta edici√≥n de los dos. En tiempo de pandemia fue imposible juntarnos. Pero creo que el resultado es m√°s que obvio. Es una hermos√≠sima canci√≥n de amor que espero toque el coraz√≥n a todo el mundo.
‚ÄĒ

Ready for life baby, forever (jajaja)
Gangster shit 
Aja

snippet.description:
De peque√Īo siempre quise una minimoto y no podia tenerla :D


Aunque solo es una 125cc como pesa tan poco corre un monton, y es super agil, creo que podria ser de lo mas divertido que tengo.

- Moto reedicion 2021 (reservar): http://bit.ly/motodax
- Radiador del motor: https://s.click.aliexpress.com/e/_A6xRt6

* Mi casco es el tipico de 30‚ā¨ y lo mejor seria uno integral, pero aun no he encontrado uno que tenga la misma visibilidad que uno abierto y pese poco (escucho ideas)

snippet.title: Apex Legends War Games Event Trailer
snippet.description:
Shall we play a game? The new War Games Event features five rotating takeover modes with never-before-seen modifiers, a new rewards track, and new skins.  

Maggie warned the Legends what would happen if they didn‚Äôt deliver Fuse to her. Now she‚Äôs following through on her threat. Say goodbye to your precious games -- Salvo‚Äôs War Games are here instead. Play five rotating limited-time takeovers over two weeks. Shields regenerate in Shield Regen, round time is reduced whenever a Legend dies in Killing Time, automatically retrieve fallen banners in Auto Banners, compete for top loot in Ultra Zones, and get a free respawn in Second Chance. Plus check out the store to get bold new cosmetics. Everybody loves a little Mayhem -- get out there and make Maggie proud. 

Apex Legends‚ĄĘ is a free-to-play battle royale game where legendary characters battle for glory, fame, and fortune on the fringes of the Frontier. Play for free now on PlayStation¬ģ 4, PlayStation 5, Xbox One, Xbox Series X|S, Nintendo Switch, and PC via Origin and Steam.  

Learn more about Apex Legends Season 8 ‚Äď Mayhem: http://x.ea.com/67416
 
Check out our YouTube channel: http://x.ea.com/56710.
Follow us on Twitter: https://twitter.com/playapex.
Follow us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/playapex/.

it.title: Apex Legends - Evento Giochi di guerra - Il trailer
it.description:
Facciamo un gioco? L'evento Giochi di guerra porta con s√© cinque modalit√† ""invasione"" a rotazione con nuovi modificatori, un percorso a premi e nuove skin.  

Maggie aveva gi√† detto cosa sarebbe successo se le leggende non le avessero consegnato il braccio di Fuse. Ora √® pronta a passare ai fatti. Di' addio ai tuoi preziosi Apex Games e dai il benvenuto ai... Giochi di guerra di Salvo. Scopri le cinque modalit√† a rotazione che ci accompagneranno per due settimane. Gli scudi si rigenerano in Rigenerazione scudi, il tempo del round si accorcia ogni volta che una leggenda viene eliminata in Tempo perso, e i banner vengono recuperati automaticamente in Banner automatici. Combatti per accaparrarti il bottino migliore in Zone ultra e ottieni un rientro gratuito in Seconda chance. E non dimenticare di dare un'occhiata al negozio per scoprire i nuovi oggetti cosmetici! A chi non piace un po' di caos? Tuffati in battaglia e rendi Maggie orgogliosa. 

Apex Legends‚ĄĘ √® un gioco gratuito in stile battle royale in cui personaggi leggendari si sfidano per gloria, fama e ricchezza ai margini della Frontiera. Gioca gratis su PlayStation 4, PlayStation 5, Xbox One, Xbox Series X|S, Nintendo Switch e PC tramite Origin e Steam.  

Scopri di pi√Ļ su Caos, la Stagione 8 di Apex Legends: http://x.ea.com/67416

Sollen wir ein Spiel spielen? Das neue Kriegsspiele-Event bietet f√ľnf rotierende √úbernahme-Modi mit brandneuen Modifikatoren, einer neuen Belohnungsreihe und neuen Skins.  

Maggie hatte die Legenden gewarnt, was passieren w√ľrde, wenn sie ihr Fuse nicht ausliefern. Jetzt l√§sst sie auf ihre Drohung Taten folgen. Verabschiedet euch von euren Spielen ‚Äď Jetzt kommen Salvos Kriegsspiele! Spielt im Laufe von zwei Wochen f√ľnf rotierende befristete √úbernahmen. W√§hrend in ""Schildregen."" Schilde regenerieren, wird die Rundenzeit in ""Kill-Zeit"" verk√ľrzt, wenn eine Legende stirbt. In ""Auto-Abzeichen"" werden verlorene Abzeichen automatisch geborgen. In ""Ultra-Zonen"" erwartet euch Top-Beute, und in ""Zweite Chance"" habt ihr einen kostenlosen Respawn. Au√üerdem erwarten euch im Store coole neue Kosmetikobjekte. Alle lieben ein bisschen Chaos. Also geht da raus und macht Maggie stolz. 

Apex Legends‚ĄĘ ist ein Free-to-Play Battle-Royale-Spiel, bei dem legend√§re Charaktere am Rande des Grenzlands um Ruhm und Reichtum k√§mpfen. Spiele Apex Legends jetzt kostenlos auf PlayStation¬ģ4, PlayStation 5, Xbox One, Xbox Series X|S, Nintendo Switch und PC √ľber Origin und Steam.

pt-BR.title: Trailer do Evento Jogos B√©licos de Apex Legends
pt-BR.description:
Vamos jogar um jogo? O novo Evento Jogos B√©licos possui cinco modos de tomada rotativos com modificadores nunca vistos, uma nova trilha de recompensas e novos visuais.

Maggie avisou as Lendas sobre o que aconteceria se n√£o entregassem o Fuse a ela. Agora ela seguiu adiante com as amea√ßas. en.title: Apex Legends War Games Event Trailer
en.description:
Shall we play a game? The new War Games Event features five rotating takeover modes with never-before-seen modifiers, a new rewards track, and new skins.  

Maggie warned the Legends what would happen if they didn‚Äôt deliver Fuse to her. Now she‚Äôs following through on her threat. Say goodbye to your precious games -- Salvo‚Äôs War Games are here instead. Play five rotating limited-time takeovers over two weeks. Shields regenerate in Shield Regen, round time is reduced whenever a Legend dies in Killing Time, automatically retrieve fallen banners in Auto Banners, compete for top loot in Ultra Zones, and get a free respawn in Second Chance. Plus check out the store to get bold new cosmetics. Everybody loves a little Mayhem -- get out there and make Maggie proud. 

Apex Legends‚ĄĘ is a free-to-play battle royale game where legendary characters battle for glory, fame, and fortune on the fringes of the Frontier. Play for free now on PlayStation¬ģ 4, PlayStation 5, Xbox One, Xbox Series X|S, Nintendo Switch, and PC via Origin and Steam.  

Learn more about Apex Legends Season 8 ‚Äď Mayhem: http://x.ea.com/67416
 
Check out our YouTube channel: http://x.ea.com/56710.

nl-NL.title: Apex Legends War Games Event-trailer
nl-NL.description:
Zullen we een spelletje spelen? Het nieuwe War Games Event bevat vijf roulerende takeover modes met nog nooit eerder geziene modifiers, een nieuw beloningenpad en nieuwe skins.  

Maggie waarschuwde de Legends voor wat er zou gebeuren als ze Fuse niet bij haar afleverden. Nu komt ze haar belofte na. Zeg maar dag tegen je kostbare games: je krijgt nu te maken met Salvo's War Games. Speel twee weken lang vijf roulerende tijdelijke takeovers. Schilden herstellen in Shield Regen, de rondetijd wordt verkort als een Legend doodgaat in Killing Time, haal automatisch gevallen banieren op in Auto Banners, speel voor de beste loot in Ultra Zones en krijg een gratis respawn in Second Chance. En ga naar de store om vette nieuwe cosmetische items te krijgen. Iedereen houdt wel van een beetje chaos: stort je in de strijd en maak Maggie trots. 

Apex Legends‚ĄĘ is een free-to-play battle royale-spel waarin legendarische personages strijden om glorie, roem en fortuin aan de rand van de Frontier. Speel nu gratis op de PlayStation¬ģ4, PlayStation¬ģ5, Xbox One, Xbox Series X|S, Nintendo Switch en pc via Origin en Steam.  

Meer informatie over Apex Legends Season 8 ‚Äď Mayhem: http://x.ea.com/67416

#GoldarmGang #Brawlstars #Belle

Fast-paced 3v3 multiplayer and battle royale made for mobile! Play with friends or solo across a variety of game modes in under three minutes.

Unlock and upgrade dozens of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Collect unique skins to stand out and show off. Battle in a variety of mysterious locations within the Brawliverse!

BATTLE IN MULTIPLE GAME MODES
- Gem Grab (3v3): Team up and out-strategize the opposing team. Collect and hold 10 gems to win, but get fragged and lose your gems.
- Showdown (Solo/Duo): A battle royale style fight for survival. Collect power ups for your Brawler. Grab a friend or play solo - be the last Brawler standing in the rowdiest battle royale yet. Winner take all!
- Brawl Ball (3v3): It's a whole new Brawl game! Show off your soccer/football skills and score two goals before the other team. There are no red cards here.
- Bounty (3v3): Take out opponents to earn stars, but don‚Äôt let them pick you off. The squad with the most stars wins the match!
- Heist (3v3): Protect your team‚Äôs safe and try to crack open your opponents‚Äô. Navigate the map to sneak, blast and blow your way clear to the enemies treasure.
- Special Events: Limited time special PvE and PvP game modes.
- Championship Challenge: Join Brawl Stars' esports scene with in-game qualifiers!

UNLOCK AND UPGRADE BRAWLERS
Collect and upgrade a variety of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Level them up and collect unique skins.

BRAWL PASS
Complete quests, open Brawl Boxes, earn Gems, pins and an exclusive Brawl Pass skin! Fresh content every season.

BECOME THE STAR PLAYER
Climb the local and regional leaderboards to prove you‚Äôre the greatest Brawler of them all!

CONSTANTLY EVOLVING
Look out for new Brawlers, skins, maps, special events and games modes in the future.

PLEASE NOTE! Brawl Stars is free to download and play, however, some game items can also be purchased for real money. If you don't want to use this feature, please disable in-app purchases in your device's settings. Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 9 years of age to play or download Brawl Stars.

Features:
- Team up for real-time 3v3 battles against players from across the world
- A fast-paced multiplayer battle royale mode made for mobile
- Unlock and collect new, powerful Brawlers - each with a signature attack and Super ability
- New events and game modes daily
- Battle solo or with friends
- Climb to the top of the leaderboards in global and local rankings 
- Join or start your own Club with fellow players to share tips and battle together
- Customize Brawlers with unlockable skins
- Player-designed maps offer challenging new terrain to master

From the makers of Clash of Clans, Clash Royale and Boom Beach!

Support:
Contact us in-game via Settings, Help and Support ‚ÄĒ or visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/brawl-stars/

Privacy Policy:
http://supercell.com/en/privacy-policy/

http://supercell.com/en/terms-of-service/

en.title: Brawl Stars Animation - The #GoldarmGang Heist
en.description:
Download NOW!! ‚Ėļ‚Ėļ https://supr.cl/playbrawl
Be a BRAWLER! Subscribe! ‚Ėļ‚Ėļ https://supr.cl/subscribe

#GoldarmGang #Brawlstars #Belle

Fast-paced 3v3 multiplayer and battle royale made for mobile! Play with friends or solo across a variety of game modes in under three minutes.

Unlock and upgrade dozens of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Collect unique skins to stand out and show off. Battle in a variety of mysterious locations within the Brawliverse!

BATTLE IN MULTIPLE GAME MODES
- Gem Grab (3v3): Team up and out-strategize the opposing team. Collect and hold 10 gems to win, but get fragged and lose your gems.
- Showdown (Solo/Duo): A battle royale style fight for survival. Collect power ups for your Brawler. Grab a friend or play solo - be the last Brawler standing in the rowdiest battle royale yet. Winner take all!
- Brawl Ball (3v3): It's a whole new Brawl game! Show off your soccer/football skills and score two goals before the other team. There are no red cards here.
- Bounty (3v3): Take out opponents to earn stars, but don‚Äôt let them pick you off. The squad with the most stars wins the match!
- Heist (3v3): Protect your team‚Äôs safe and try to crack open your opponents‚Äô. Navigate the map to sneak, blast and blow your way clear to the enemies treasure.
- Special Events: Limited time special PvE and PvP game modes.
- Championship Challenge: Join Brawl Stars' esports scene with in-game qualifiers!

UNLOCK AND UPGRADE BRAWLERS
Collect and upgrade a variety of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Level them up and collect unique skins.

BRAWL PASS
Complete quests, open Brawl Boxes, earn Gems, pins and an exclusive Brawl Pass skin! Fresh content every season.

BECOME THE STAR PLAYER
Climb the local and regional leaderboards to prove you‚Äôre the greatest Brawler of them all!

CONSTANTLY EVOLVING
Look out for new Brawlers, skins, maps, special events and games modes in the future.

PLEASE NOTE! Brawl Stars is free to download and play, however, some game items can also be purchased for real money. If you don't want to use this feature, please disable in-app purchases in your device's settings. Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 9 years of age to play or download Brawl Stars.

Features:
- Team up for real-time 3v3 battles against players from across the world
- A fast-paced multiplayer battle royale mode made for mobile
- Unlock and collect new, powerful Brawlers - each with a signature attack and Super ability
- New events and game modes daily
- Battle solo or with friends
- Climb to the top of the leaderboards in global and local rankings 
- Join or start your own Club with fellow players to share tips and battle together
- Customize Brawlers with unlockable skins
- Player-designed maps offer challenging new terrain to master

From the makers of Clash of Clans, Clash Royale and Boom Beach!

snippet.title: Space Jam: Una Nueva Era - Trailer 1
snippet.description:
¬°Bienvenidos al partido del siglo! El campe√≥n de la NBA e √≠cono mundial LeBron James se embarca en una aventura √©pica junto a Bugs Bunny con el evento animado / de acci√≥n en vivo "Space Jam: Una Nueva Era‚ÄĚ, del director Malcolm D. Lee y un equipo de cine innovador que incluye a Ryan Coogler y Maverick Carter. Este viaje de transformaci√≥n es una combinaci√≥n man√≠aca de dos mundos que revela hasta d√≥nde llegar√°n algunos padres para conectarse con sus hijos. Cuando LeBron y su peque√Īo hijo Dom quedan atrapados en un espacio digital por una IA deshonesta, LeBron debe llevarlos a casa a salvo liderando a Bugs, Lola Bunny y toda la pandilla de Looney Tunes notoriamente indisciplinados a la victoria sobre los campeones digitalizados de la IA en el cancha: una lista mejorada de estrellas profesionales del baloncesto como nunca antes las hab√≠as visto. Son Tunes versus Goons en el desaf√≠o m√°s importante de su vida, que redefinir√° el v√≠nculo de LeBron con su hijo y arrojar√° luz sobre el poder de ser uno mismo. Las melod√≠as listas para la acci√≥n destruyen las convenciones, potencian sus talentos √ļnicos y sorprenden incluso al "Rey" James jugando el juego a su manera.

James protagoniza junto al nominado al Oscar Don Cheadle (las pel√≠culas de "Los Vengadores", "Hotel Rwanda"), Khris Davis ("Judas y el Mes√≠as Negro", la serie de televisi√≥n "Atlanta"), Sonequa Martin-Green (la serie de televisi√≥n "The Walking Dead", " Star Trek: Discovery ‚ÄĚ), el nuevo talento Cedric Joe, Jeff Bergman (‚Äú Looney Tunes Cartoons ‚ÄĚ) y Eric Bauza (‚Äú Looney Tunes Cartoons ‚ÄĚ).

Lee (‚ÄúViaje de Chicas‚ÄĚ, ‚ÄúNight School‚ÄĚ) dirige a partir de un gui√≥n de Juel Taylor, Tony Rettenmaier, Keenan Coogler y Terence Nance. Los productores de la pel√≠cula son Ryan Coogler, LeBron James, Maverick Carter y Duncan Henderson, y los productores ejecutivos son Sev Ohanian, Zinzi Coogler, Allison Abbate, Jesse Ehrman, Jamal Henderson, Spencer Beighley, Justin Lin, Terence Nance e Ivan Reitman.

El equipo creativo detr√°s de escena del director incluye al director de fotograf√≠a Salvatore Totino ("Spider-Man: De Regreso a Casa‚ÄĚ), el productor de animaci√≥n Troy Nethercott (‚ÄúParque M√°gico‚ÄĚ), los dise√Īadores de producci√≥n Kevin Ishioka (‚ÄúLa Mula‚ÄĚ), Akin McKenzie ( ‚ÄúAs√≠ nos ven‚ÄĚ de Netflix) y Clint Wallace (pr√≥ximamente "Eternals"), el editor Bob Ducsay (‚ÄúGodzilla II: El Rey de los Monstruos‚ÄĚ, ‚ÄúLa Guerra de las Galaxias, episodio VIII: los √ļltimos Jedi‚ÄĚ)  y la dise√Īadora de vestuario Melissa Bruning  (‚ÄúRampage: devastaci√≥n‚ÄĚ). La m√ļsica es de Kris Bowers (‚ÄúGreen Book: una amistad sin fronteras‚ÄĚ y la serie ‚ÄúBridgerton‚ÄĚ).

Warner Bros. Pictures presenta una producci√≥n de Proximity / The SpringHill Company, una pel√≠cula de Malcolm D. Lee, "Space Jam: Una Nueva Era‚ÄĚ. La pel√≠cula ser√° distribuida mundialmente por Warner Bros. Pictures. Pr√≥ximamente - Solo en Cines.

snippet.title: Goodbye Old Stuff! Hammer Jam is BACK! (Clash Of Clans Official)
snippet.description:
The Hammer Jam event is back and it's the season of upgrades! Take full advantage of the 50% Home Village building cost reduction, and get ready for the first update of the year that's coming veeeery soon! ūüĎÄ


Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter ‚Ėļ https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram ‚Ėļhttps://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook ‚Ėļhttps://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. http://supr.cl/ThisArmy

From rage-¬≠filled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clas...

Privacy Policy:
http://www.supercell.net/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://www.supercell.net/terms-of-ser...

snippet.title: Star Wars: The Bad Batch | Official Trailer | Disney+
snippet.description:
Check out the brand-new trailer for Lucasfilm‚Äôs ‚ÄúStar Wars: The Bad Batch,‚ÄĚ an original animated series launching exclusively on Disney+. ‚ÄúStar Wars: The Bad Batch‚ÄĚ makes its debut on Tuesday, May 4, with a special 70-minute premiere, followed by new episodes every Friday starting on May 7. 

 

‚ÄúStar Wars: The Bad Batch‚ÄĚ follows the elite and experimental clones of the Bad Batch (first introduced in ‚ÄúThe Clone Wars‚ÄĚ) as they find their way in a rapidly changing galaxy in the immediate aftermath of the Clone War. Members of Bad Batch‚ÄĒa unique squad of clones who vary genetically from their brothers in the Clone Army‚ÄĒeach possess a singular exceptional skill that makes them extraordinarily effective soldiers and a formidable crew.

 

‚ÄúStar Wars: The Bad Batch‚ÄĚ is executive produced by Dave Filoni (‚ÄúThe Mandalorian,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúStar Wars: The Clone Wars‚ÄĚ), Athena Portillo (‚ÄúStar Wars: The Clone Wars,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúStar Wars Rebels‚ÄĚ), Brad Rau (‚ÄúStar Wars Rebels,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúStar Wars Resistance‚ÄĚ) and Jennifer Corbett (‚ÄúStar Wars Resistance,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúNCIS‚ÄĚ) with Carrie Beck (‚ÄúThe Mandalorian,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúStar Wars Rebels‚ÄĚ) as co-executive producer and Josh Rimes as producer (‚ÄúStar Wars Resistance‚ÄĚ). Rau is also serving as supervising director with Corbett as head writer.    

 

Visit StarWars.com for more exciting news on the series.

‚ÄúStar Wars: The Bad Batch‚ÄĚ is executive produced by Dave Filoni (‚ÄúThe Mandalorian,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúStar Wars: The Clone Wars‚ÄĚ), Athena Portillo (‚ÄúStar Wars: The Clone Wars,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúStar Wars Rebels‚ÄĚ), Brad Rau (‚ÄúStar Wars Rebels,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúStar Wars Resistance‚ÄĚ) and Jennifer Corbett (‚ÄúStar Wars Resistance,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúNCIS‚ÄĚ) with Carrie Beck (‚ÄúThe Mandalorian,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúStar Wars Rebels‚ÄĚ) as co-executive producer and Josh Rimes as producer (‚ÄúStar Wars Resistance‚ÄĚ). Rau is also serving as supervising director with Corbett as head writer.    

 

Visit StarWars.com for more exciting news on the series.

snippet.title: reclaiming power : Dancing with the Devil
snippet.description:
‚ÄúYou really find out who‚Äôs there for you when the world falls out from under your feet.‚ÄĚ
Demi goes to rehab and begins her road to recovery, but with bumps along the way. As she returns to the stage for the first time since her overdose, she needs to find balance in her life.
Resources:
 
SAMHSA Hotline for individuals and family members facing mental health and/or substance use disorders
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
National Sexual Assault Hotline
www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)
 
Or if you need immediate support, please reach out to your local crisis text line:
USA: Text HOME to 741741
UK: Text SHOUT to 85258
Canada: Text CONNECT to 686868 or 741741
 
For mental health education and resources go to Hope for the Day at hftd.org 
 
Learn how to save lives at endoverdose.net.

Production Companies: OBB Pictures, SB Films
Director: Michael D. Ratner
Executive Producers: Michael D. Ratner, Scott Ratner, Scooter Braun, Allison Kaye, Scott Manson, Kfir Goldberg, Miranda Sherman, Andy Mininger

snippet.title: ūüĒ• El Hotel M√ĀS LUJOSO de Venezuela: Humboldt | Venezuela Ep.6/11 ūüáĽūüá™ Alex Tienda ūüĆé
snippet.description:
ūüĎČūüŹľ Episodio 1: https://youtu.be/7pp6N5FO-ko
ūüĎČūüŹľ Episodio 2: https://youtu.be/JGTP72nl-xs
ūüĎČūüŹľ Episodio 3: https://youtu.be/_LhfyqvHq2c 
ūüĎČūüŹľ Episodio 4: https://youtu.be/2fp8c28Bydw

ūüĎČūüŹľ Episodio 6: https://youtu.be/8tRS9YNyJw0
ūüĎČūüŹľ Episodio 7: https://youtu.be/ablFXEPm8FQ

ūüĎČūüŹľ TODOS los episodios: https://bit.ly/SerieVenezuelaAT
ūüĒ•Nuevos Episodios: Viernes y DomingosūüĒ•

ūüĎČūüŹľ S√≠gueme en Instagram!: http://instagram.com/SoyAlexTienda

Llevaba varios d√≠as recorriendo las calles de Caracas‚Ä¶ Ya hab√≠a conocido algunos de los barrios populares que se encuentran al oeste de la ciudad‚Ä¶ viaj√© hasta el otro extremo para conocer las zonas en donde viven los millonarios‚Ä¶ Camin√© por las calles del centro para aprender sobre su historia, para entender la actualidad‚Ä¶ Pero sobre todo para conocer a la gente que cada d√≠a sale a las calles de Caracas con una gran actitud por darlo todo para sacar adelante a su pa√≠s‚Ä¶ De hecho eran tantas mis ganas de explorar este ciudad, que en un momento de sed y antojos durante una noche y tal vez un poco de locura‚Ä¶ Sal√≠ de mi hotel para recorrer las obscuras y solitarias calles de Caracas en busca de una tiendita‚Ä¶

Y mientras todo esto suced√≠a‚Ä¶ Hab√≠a un personaje muy importante y querido por todos los habitantes de Caracas‚Ä¶ Que observaba atento y en silencio cada movimiento que yo hac√≠a‚Ä¶ Al igual que observa durante d√≠a y noche la vida de todos los habitantes de esta ciudad‚Ä¶ Como si se tratara de un vigilante gigante al cual todos los caraque√Īos le tienen mucho cari√Īo y respeto.¬†

Se trata de El √Āvila‚Ä¶ Una enorme monta√Īa de m√°s de dos mil metros de altura, que sirve como muralla natural entre la ciudad de Caracas y la costa del Caribe.
En esta monta√Īa podemos encontrar un parque nacional y en la cima de uno de sus picos‚Ä¶ Un extravagante hotel de lujo, construido en los a√Īos 50s‚Ä¶ Pero que estuvo abandonado durante m√°s de 50 a√Īos‚Ä¶ Y hoy guarda una de las historias m√°s interesantes de la vida de los Venezolanos.

Para que puedas entender mejor la importancia que tuvo para mi viaje por Venezuela, el haberme podido hospedar en este hotel... Te voy a platicar la primera parte de la historia del hotel Humboldt y m√°s adelante, cuando entremos juntos a conocerlo, podr√°s comprender por qu√© este hotel, se ha vuelto tan enigm√°tico para los venezolanos.

Llevaba varios d√≠as recorriendo las calles de Caracas‚Ä¶ Ya hab√≠a conocido algunos de los barrios populares que se encuentran al oeste de la ciudad‚Ä¶ viaj√© hasta el otro extremo para conocer las zonas en donde viven los millonarios‚Ä¶ Camin√© por las calles del centro para aprender sobre su historia, para entender la actualidad‚Ä¶ Pero sobre todo para conocer a la gente que cada d√≠a sale a las calles de Caracas con una gran actitud por darlo todo para sacar adelante a su pa√≠s‚Ä¶ De hecho eran tantas mis ganas de explorar este ciudad, que en un momento de sed y antojos durante una noche y tal vez un poco de locura‚Ä¶ Sal√≠ de mi hotel para recorrer las obscuras y solitarias calles de Caracas en busca de una tiendita‚Ä¶

Y mientras todo esto suced√≠a‚Ä¶ Hab√≠a un personaje muy importante y querido por todos los habitantes de Caracas‚Ä¶ Que observaba atento y en silencio cada movimiento que yo hac√≠a‚Ä¶ Al igual que observa durante d√≠a y noche la vida de todos los habitantes de esta ciudad‚Ä¶ Como si se tratara de un vigilante gigante al cual todos los caraque√Īos le tienen mucho cari√Īo y respeto.¬†

Se trata de El √Āvila‚Ä¶ Una enorme monta√Īa de m√°s de dos mil metros de altura, que sirve como muralla natural entre la ciudad de Caracas y la costa del Caribe.
En esta monta√Īa podemos encontrar un parque nacional y en la cima de uno de sus picos‚Ä¶ Un extravagante hotel de lujo, construido en los a√Īos 50s‚Ä¶ Pero que estuvo abandonado durante m√°s de 50 a√Īos‚Ä¶ Y hoy guarda una de las historias m√°s interesantes de la vida de los Venezolanos.

Para que puedas entender mejor la importancia que tuvo para mi viaje por Venezuela, el haberme podido hospedar en este hotel... Te voy a platicar la primera parte de la historia del hotel Humboldt y m√°s adelante, cuando entremos juntos a conocerlo, podr√°s comprender por qu√© este hotel, se ha vuelto tan enigm√°tico para los venezolanos.

snippet.title: Taylor Swift ft. Maren Morris - You All Over Me (From The Vault) (Official Lyric Video)
snippet.description:
Official lyric video for ‚ÄúYou All Over Me‚ÄĚ (Feat. Maren Morris) (Taylor‚Äôs Version) [From The Vault] ‚Äď off her upcoming Fearless (Taylor‚Äôs Version) album. Pre-order the album here: https://taylor.lnk.to/fearlesstaylorsversion. Get the song here: http://taylor.lnk.to/yaom
‚ĖļSubscribe to Taylor Swift on YouTube: https://ts.lnk.to/subscribe 

‚ĖļExclusive Merch: http://taylorswift.lnk.to/store
‚ĖļFollow Taylor Swift online:
Instagram: http://instagram.com/taylorswift 
Facebook: http://facebook.com/taylorswift 
Tumblr: http://taylorswift.tumblr.com 
Twitter: http://twitter.com/taylorswift13 
Snapchat: http://snapchat.com/add/taylorswift
Website: http://www.taylorswift.com 
‚ĖļFollow Taylor Nation Online
Instagram: http://instagram.com/taylornation 
Tumblr: http://taylornation.tumblr.com 
Twitter: http://twitter.com/taylornation13
Official Lyrics:

Once the last drop of rain has dried off the pavement
Shouldn't I find a stain, but I never do
The way the tires turn stones, on old county roads
They leave ‚Äėem muddy underneath 
Reminds me of you
You find graffiti on the walls of old bathroom stalls
You know, you can scratch it right off 
It's how it used to be
But like the dollar in your pocket that's been spent and traded in
You can't change where it's been
Reminds me of me

I lived, and I learned
Had you, got burned
Held out, and held on
God knows, too long
And wasted time, lost tears 
Swore that I'd get out of here
But no amount of freedom gets you clean
I‚Äôve still got you all over me

The best and worst day of June
Was the one that I met you
With your hands in your pockets
And your ‚Äėdon't you wish you had me‚Äô grin
But I did, so I smiled, and I melted like a child
Now every breath of air I breathe reminds me of then

And I lived, and I learned 
Had you, got burned
Held out, and held on
God knows, too long
And wasted time, lost tears 
Swore that I'd get out of here
But no amount of freedom gets you clean
I‚Äôve still got you all over me

I lived, and I learned 
And found out what it was to turn around
And see, that we 
Were never really meant to be
So I lied, and I cried 
And I watched a part of myself die
Cause no amount of freedom gets you clean
I‚Äôve still got you all over me
I‚Äôve still got you all over me
Still got you all over me
#taylorswift #youalloverme #marenmorris #fearlesstaylorsversion

snippet.title: Lucas 23:32 - Funky x Alex Zurdo x Redimi2 #UNO
snippet.description:
Lucas 23:32 - Funky x Alex Zurdo x Redimi2 (Video Oficial) #UNO

Suscr√≠bete a mi canal y activa la campanita: http://bit.ly/FunkyPR

S√≠gueme en redes sociales:
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/YoSoyFunky
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/funkypr/
Twitter: https://twitter.com/FunkyPR

Sigue a Redimi2 en:
Web: http://www.redimi2web.com
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/redimi2oficial
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/realredimi2
Twitter: https://twitter.com/realredimi2

Sigue a Alex Zurdo en:
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/alexzurdomusic
Twitter: https://twitter.com/AlexZurdoMusic
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/alexzurdomusic/
--------------
Letra:

[Redimi2]
Ah, ah√≠ estas t√ļ el que dec√≠as
Ser el enviado, el supuesto mes√≠as
El que iba a destruir el templo
Y a reconstruirlo en tres dias

Fantas√≠as y sensacionalismo
Tus seguidores llenos de fanatismo
Si en verdad eres quien dices ser
S√°lvanos y s√°lvate a ti mismo

Si resucitaste muertos con tu palabra
Si en verdad sanaste tanta gente
Como es posible que no puedas liberarte
Si aqu√≠ estamos consciente de que eres inocente

Aunque pens√°ndolo bien eres culpable
Tu poder se hizo dudable
Demu√©strame que me equivoco
O s√°lvanos que esta agon√≠a es insoportable

[Alex Zurdo]
Yo detendr√≠a todo esto porque puedo
Pero es necesario esta situaci√≥n
Y no has entendido que si aqu√≠ me quedo
Llegar√° la verdadera salvaci√≥n

Quieren que me libre de la muerte
Pa que siga con la vida
Pero yo dar√© la vida
Y ser√°n libres con mi muerte

Que si de verdad soy fuerte
Que me baje enseguida
Pero yo soy la verdad
Que enseguida te hace fuerte

Y aunque no entiendas y razones mal
Todo es parte de un plan inmenso
Que empez√≥ por la parte final
Y termin√≥ elaborando el comienzo

//Solo el amor, soporta el dolor
Perdona tu error y te da favor//

[Funky]
Hey, ser√° que no temes a Dios
Este hombre no merece estar aqu√≠ con nosotros dos
No, no seas indiferente
Que a √©l lo han condenado injustamente

√Čl no ten√≠a que atravesar este tormento
Sus verdugos sentir√°n el remordimiento
Presiento que este hombre es el hijo del Dios viviente
Creo que se est√° derramando sangre inocente

Jes√ļs yo no voy a reclamarte nada
Tu no me debes nada, yo no nada merezco
Ha sido un honor tenerte cerca aunque sea
En este momento en el que perezco

[Redimi2]
Ja, no me digas que le crees
√Čl no es lo que dijo ser
¬ŅNo lo ves? Solo es un rey de prostitutas y ladrones
Uno de m√°s de entre tantas religiones

[Funky]
Pues yo creo que es prop√≥sito divino
Que √©l est√© en esa cruz es parte de su destino
Se√Īor yo si te creo y creo que eres la vida
Que eres la verdad y que eres el camino

No me tienes que contestar
Solo una cosa te voy a rogar
No me vayas a olvidar
Y acu√©rdate de m√≠ cuando comiences a reinar

[Alex Zurdo]
Ni la vida, ni la muerte
Ni el presente o porvenir
Nada te separar√° de mi

Ni la vida, ni la muerte
Ni el lugar en donde estoy
//Nada impedir√° que est√©s en el para√≠so//

// (Te aseguro desde hoy
Ir√°s conmigo a donde voy) //

snippet.title: losing control : Dancing with the Devil
snippet.description:
‚ÄúI crossed a line I‚Äôd never crossed in addiction.‚ÄĚ 

In part I of this fearless documentary series, Demi Lovato and her family and friends candidly open up for the first time about what led to her near-fatal overdose.

Resources:
 
The National Eating Disorders Association (NEDA) helpline
1-800-931-2237 (they also offer click-to-chat messaging) 
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org
 
SAMHSA Hotline for individuals and family members facing mental health and/or substance use disorders
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
If you need immediate support, please reach out to your local crisis text line:
USA: Text HOME to 741741
UK: Text SHOUT to 85258
Canada: Text CONNECT to 686868 or 741741

Production Companies: OBB Pictures, SB Films
Director: Michael D. Ratner
Executive Producers: Michael D. Ratner, Scott Ratner, Scooter Braun, Allison Kaye, Scott Manson, Kfir Goldberg, Miranda Sherman, Andy Mininger


Pre-order Demi Lovato‚Äôs new album ‚ÄėDancing With The Devil‚Ä¶ The Art Of Starting Over‚Äô https://DemiLovato.lnk.to/DWTDTAOSOID
